context: Tests whether the agent builds the server-side autocomplete endpoint with multi-index search, correct Algolia query parameters, merchandising boosts, query result caching, and no-results tracking.

checklist.name: Multi-index parallel search
checklist.description: The endpoint queries both 'products' and 'categories' indices (not just products), using Promise.all or equivalent concurrent execution

checklist.name: Products limit 5
checklist.description: The products index query requests at most 5 hits (hitsPerPage or equivalent parameter set to 5)

checklist.name: Categories limit 3
checklist.description: The categories index query requests at most 3 hits (hitsPerPage or equivalent parameter set to 3)

checklist.name: Products attributesToRetrieve
checklist.description: The products query specifies attributesToRetrieve containing all of: objectID, name, image, price, url, category

checklist.name: Categories attributesToRetrieve
checklist.description: The categories query specifies attributesToRetrieve containing all of: name, url, product_count

checklist.name: Merchandising optionalFilters
checklist.description: The products query includes optionalFilters boosting is_featured:true and in_stock:true using score notation (e.g., 'is_featured:true<score=2>')

checklist.name: LRU cache implementation
checklist.description: A cache (LRU or equivalent bounded cache) is implemented to serve repeated identical queries without hitting Algolia again

checklist.name: No-results query logging
checklist.description: When all result arrays are empty (zero products and zero categories), the query is logged or recorded for analytics/monitoring purposes

checklist.name: Min chars guard
checklist.description: The endpoint returns an empty result set (without querying Algolia) when the query parameter is absent or shorter than 2 characters

checklist.name: attributesToHighlight for names
checklist.description: The products query includes attributesToHighlight for 'name' so that highlight markup is returned in the response
